title: rubus despectus
intro: Rubus despectus, also known as the thimbleberry, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus despectus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of thimbleberry can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
